summary: Comprehensive testing of Automated Partner Assignment and Unassigned Tasks Alert System for Konekt B2B platform. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working - Dashboard widget, Service Tasks page with Unassigned filter, deep links, and task detail drawer with auto-assignment info.
critical_code_review_comments: Auto-assignment engine (_auto_assign_partner) working correctly - matches by service_key in partner_service_capabilities
Success path: POST /api/admin/service-tasks without partner_id + matching capability → status=assigned, auto_assigned=true, partner_id set
Failure path: POST /api/admin/service-tasks without partner_id + no matching capability → status=unassigned, auto_assigned=false, assignment_failure_reason set
Manual assignment: POST /api/admin/service-tasks with partner_id → bypasses auto-assignment, uses provided partner
Stats endpoint GET /api/admin/service-tasks/stats/summary returns correct counts including unassigned (8 unassigned, 15 awaiting, 7 to_review)
Notification triggers verified: unassigned_task_alert created in DB when auto-assignment fails
Dashboard widget shows correct counts: 8 Unassigned, 15 Awaiting, 7 To Review pills
Dashboard CTA links to /admin/service-tasks?filter=unassigned when unassigned tasks exist
Service Tasks page has Unassigned filter tab with amber styling when count > 0
Deep link ?filter=unassigned correctly activates Unassigned filter tab
Task detail drawer shows auto-assignment info (success/failure indicators with reason)
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Partner: demo.partner@konekt.com / Partner123!
seed_data_creation: Created test service tasks with TEST_V253 prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Automated Partner Assignment system fully verified. Backend auto-assignment engine uses partner_service_capabilities collection to match service_type. Known partner 'On Demand Limited' (id=69c102497d428cfc6f811c2f) has capability for 'printing' service. Use service_type='printing' for successful auto-assignment tests, use non-matching service_type for failure path tests.

backend_endpoints: POST /api/admin/service-tasks - Creates task, triggers auto-assignment if no partner_id
POST /api/admin/service-tasks (with partner_id) - Manual assignment bypasses auto-assignment
GET /api/admin/service-tasks/{task_id} - Returns task with auto_assigned, assignment_failure_reason fields
frontend_features: Admin Dashboard Partner Response Pipeline widget with Unassigned, Awaiting, To Review, Overdue pills
Service Tasks page filter tabs: All (34), Unassigned (8), Awaiting (15), To Review (7), In Progress (4), Completed (0), Overdue (0)
Unassigned filter tab has amber styling when count > 0
Task detail drawer shows Auto-assignment Failed indicator with failure reason
Task detail drawer shows Auto-assigned indicator for successful auto-assignments
Timeline shows auto_assignment_failed event with reason
notification_triggers: unassigned_task_alert - Created when auto-assignment fails (verified 5 alerts in DB)
service_task_assigned - Sent to partner when task is assigned (manual or auto)
